summary: Still Early Badge & Explanation Lines Feature - All 10 backend tests PASSED (100%), All frontend tests PASSED. New program_age_days field, still_early state override, and explanation lines all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/internal/programs/batch-metrics returns program_age_days field for each program
VERIFIED: Stanford (0 meaningful, ~2 days old) returns 'still_early' not 'cooling_off'
VERIFIED: BYU (0 meaningful, ~1 day old) returns 'still_early'
VERIFIED: UF (14 meaningful interactions) still returns 'strong_momentum' (unchanged)
VERIFIED: UCLA (1 meaningful interaction) still returns 'active' (unchanged)
VERIFIED: Pipeline page renders explanation line under each health badge
VERIFIED: UF card shows 'Coach Reply today' explanation
VERIFIED: Stanford card shows 'No signals yet' explanation
VERIFIED: Still Early badges use purple color (#a78bfa) and Sprout icon
VERIFIED: 12 health badges and 12 explanation lines rendered on Pipeline page
VERIFIED: All previous Pipeline functionality intact (Kanban board, navigation)
CODE QUALITY: _compute_pipeline_health() correctly overrides at_risk/cooling_off to still_early when program_age_days <= 14 AND meaningful_interaction_count == 0
CODE QUALITY: getExplanation() function in PipelineHealthBadge.js returns appropriate text based on state and engagement metrics
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen data with recomputed metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Still Early badge feature fully tested. New fields: program_age_days (int), still_early state for new programs (<= 14 days) with 0 meaningful interactions. PipelineHealthBadge component now shows explanation line below badge in compact variant (data-testid='health-explanation-{program_id}'). Explanation text logic: still_early -> 'No signals yet', others -> based on last_meaningful_engagement_type and days_since. Badge configs: still_early uses purple (#a78bfa) with Sprout icon. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_still_early_badges.py (10 tests). Total iterations: 96.
